count_tokens_text: estimate the token count of a string using tiktoken cl100k_base or a chars over 3.5 fallback
count_message_tokens_list: sum the estimated token count across a list of session message objects including tool calls and results
get_encoder_lazy: lazily load and memoize the tiktoken cl100k_base encoder for reuse across token counting calls
count_tokens_disable_tiktoken: count tokens with the chars over 3.5 fallback when the CODER_DISABLE_TIKTOKEN environment variable is set to 1
count_message_tokens_tool_calls: estimate tokens for message tool call arguments and tool result outputs and errors in a message list
